summary: Comprehensive testing of LeadNation Global Trade Intelligence Portal. Backend: all 15 pytest tests passed across countries, business-types, trade-directions, products, trade-news, expos, customs-compliance (IN/AE), product-info, search (basm/ind/empty), leads create + invalid email, and india-features. Frontend: validated home (hero, globe canvas, search input/autocomplete, nav links, CTAs, India features, footer download badges, WhatsApp floating btn), customs-compliance (result auto-loads + import/export toggle), trade-news (featured + cards), expo (8+ cards + category filters), product-info (initial auto-result + submit), and contact (form submit -> success + embedded OpenStreetMap iframe at Ahilyanagar coords). All tested data-testids present. Lead POST persists & returns {ok,id}. WhatsApp href correctly points to wa.me/918237161088.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/customs-compliance hardcodes 'Semi-milled or wholly milled rice' HS example regardless of product context — acceptable for Phase-1 mock but should be parameterised once a real engine is plugged in.
server.py: /api/product-info accepts a raw dict instead of a Pydantic model — add ProductInfoRequest model for input validation in next iteration.
CORS allow_credentials=True combined with allow_origins='*' is technically invalid per spec; works in dev but should be restricted to known origins in production.
/api/search empty-query returns all products+countries which could be large — fine for current dataset (~30 items) but worth capping/short-circuiting on empty query for clarity.
test_credentials: No auth required (single-tenant, no login). test_credentials.md not needed.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 lead via POST /api/leads (TEST_ prefixed name, test_leadnation@example.com). MongoDB collection 'leads' will accumulate test entries — recommend manual cleanup if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 15 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_leadnation_api.py — reuse as regression. Frontend uses data-testids consistently per request. Note: contact-map testid is on the iframe itself (not parent). Home search results show only when input focused AND results.length > 0; type with focus and ~1.5s debounce to see autocomplete. All engines are mocked per Phase-1 spec.
